title: Plan for Neighbourhoods: Data packs
body: "The packs collate and summarise a range of publicly available data sources relevant to the Plan for Neighbourhoods programme. They do not make policy recommendations. Sources in these packs are the latest available as of 1 April 2025.  Published below are 75 data packs for England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland.    Accrington  (PDF, 1.39 MB, 21 pages)  Arbroath  (PDF, 892 KB, 15 pages)  Ashton-under-Lyne  (PDF, 1.45 MB, 21 pages)  Barnsley  (PDF, 1.52 MB, 21 pages)  Barry (Vale of Glamorgan)  (PDF, 1.11 MB, 19
